creator: jessefrgsmith@yahoo.ca
text:
After the 2.26 release, GNOME dropped the game Blackjack from the gnome-games package. This port does the reverse, taking the source of gnome-games and installing only the Blackjack application from the suite. 

This port provides the classic card game Blackjack, and can be considered a companion port to gnome-games.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
